sql_units.sql_text:
<select id="findOrdersWithCommon" resultType="com.test.entity.Order">
        SELECT <include refid="orderWithCommonColumns" />
        FROM orders o
        <where>
            <include refid="orderSearchCondition" />
        </where>
        <include refid="com.test.mapper.CommonMapper.paginationCondition" />
    </select>

<select id="findOrdersConditional" resultType="com.test.entity.Order">
        SELECT * FROM orders
        <where>
            <if test="useCommonCondition">
                <include refid="com.test.mapper.CommonMapper.complexCommonCondition" />
            </if>
            <if test="orderStatus != null">AND status = #{orderStatus}</if>
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="findOrdersByMode" resultType="com.test.entity.Order">
        SELECT * FROM orders
        <where>
            <choose>
                <when test="mode == 'active'">
                    <include refid="com.test.mapper.CommonMapper.activeStatusCondition" />
                </when>
                <when test="mode == 'dateRange'">
                    <include refid="com.test.mapper.CommonMapper.dateRangeCondition" />
                </when>
                <otherwise>
                    <include refid="com.test.mapper.CommonMapper.complexCommonCondition" />
                </otherwise>
            </choose>
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="findOrdersComplex" resultType="com.test.entity.Order">
        SELECT * FROM orders
        <where>
            <if test="filterEnabled">
                <include refid="com.test.mapper.CommonMapper.complexCommonCondition" />
            </if>
            <if test="ids != null and ids.size() > 0">
                AND id IN
                <foreach collection="ids" item="id" open="(" separator="," close=")">#{id}</foreach>
            </if>
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testSingleIf" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where>
            <if test="name != null">AND name = #{name}</if>
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testTwoIf" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where>
            <if test="name != null">AND name = #{name}</if>
            <if test="email != null">AND email = #{email}</if>
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testThreeIf" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where>
            <if test="name != null">AND name = #{name}</if>
            <if test="email != null">AND email = #{email}</if>
            <if test="status != null">AND status = #{status}</if>
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testFourIf" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where>
            <if test="name != null">AND name = #{name}</if>
            <if test="email != null">AND email = #{email}</if>
            <if test="status != null">AND status = #{status}</if>
            <if test="type != null">AND type = #{type}</if>
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testChooseWhen" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where>
            <choose>
                <when test="type == 'VIP'">AND type = 'VIP'</when>
                <when test="type == 'NORMAL'">AND type = 'NORMAL'</when>
            </choose>
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testChooseOtherwise" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where>
            <choose>
                <when test="type == 'VIP'">AND type = 'VIP'</when>
                <when test="type == 'NORMAL'">AND type = 'NORMAL'</when>
                <otherwise>AND type = 'PREMIUM'</otherwise>
            </choose>
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testWhereIf" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where><if test="status != null">status = #{status}</if></where>
    </select>

<select id="testForeachIn" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users WHERE id IN
        <foreach collection="ids" item="id" open="(" separator="," close=")">#{id}</foreach>
    </select>

<select id="testTrim" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <trim prefix="WHERE " suffixOverrides="AND|OR">
            <if test="name != null">name = #{name} AND</if>
            <if test="status != null">status = #{status}</if>
        </trim>
    </select>

<select id="testIfChoose" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where>
            <if test="status != null">
                <choose>
                    <when test="status == '1'">AND status = '1'</when>
                    <when test="status == '2'">AND status = '2'</when>
                </choose>
            </if>
            <if test="type != null">AND type = #{type}</if>
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testWhereMultipleIf" resultType="User">
        SELECT id, name, email, status, type, created_at
        FROM users
        <where>
            <if test="name != null">AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')</if>
            <if test="email != null">AND email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{email}, '%')</if>
            <if test="status != null">AND status = #{status}</if>
            <if test="type != null">AND type = #{type}</if>
        </where>
        LIMIT 1000
    </select>

<select id="testChooseMultipleIf" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <choose>
            <when test="type == 'VIP'">
                <where><if test="status != null">AND status = #{status}</if>AND type = 'VIP'</where>
            </when>
            <when test="type == 'NORMAL'">
                <where><if test="status != null">AND status = #{status}</if>AND type = 'NORMAL'</where>
            </when>
            <otherwise>
                <where><if test="status != null">AND status = #{status}</if></where>
            </otherwise>
        </choose>
    </select>

<select id="testIfForeach" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where>
            <if test="status != null">AND status = #{status}</if>
            <if test="ids != null and ids.size() > 0">AND id IN <foreach collection="ids" item="id" open="(" separator="," close=")">#{id}</foreach></if>
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testWhereChooseWhen" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where>
            <choose>
                <when test="status != null and status == '1'">AND status = '1'</when>
                <when test="type != null">AND type = #{type}</when>
                <otherwise>AND status = '1'</otherwise>
            </choose>
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testChooseWithMultipleIf" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <choose>
            <when test="type == 'VIP'"><where><if test="status != null">AND status = #{status}</if>AND type = 'VIP'</where></when>
            <when test="type == 'NORMAL'"><where><if test="status != null">AND status = #{status}</if>AND type = 'NORMAL'</where></when>
            <otherwise><where><if test="status != null">AND status = #{status}</if></where></otherwise>
        </choose>
    </select>

<select id="testFiveIf" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where>
            <if test="name != null">AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')</if>
            <if test="email != null">AND email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{email}, '%')</if>
            <if test="status != null">AND status = #{status}</if>
            <if test="type != null">AND type = #{type}</if>
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testChooseNestedChoose" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where>
            <choose>
                <when test="status != null and status == '1'">
                    <choose>
                        <when test="type == 'VIP'">AND status = '1' AND type = 'VIP'</when>
                        <when test="type == 'NORMAL'">AND status = '1' AND type = 'NORMAL'</when>
                        <otherwise>AND status = '1'</otherwise>
                    </choose>
                </when>
                <otherwise>AND status IN ('1', '2')</otherwise>
            </choose>
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testComplexConditions" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where>
            <if test="name != null">AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')</if>
            <if test="email != null">AND email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{email}, '%')</if>
            <choose>
                <when test="status != null and status == '1'">AND status = '1'</when>
                <when test="type == 'VIP'">AND type = 'VIP'</when>
            </choose>
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testDynamicOrderBy" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where><if test="name != null">AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')</if></where>
        <if test="orderField != null and orderType != null">ORDER BY ${orderField} ${orderType}</if>
    </select>

<select id="testBindIf" resultType="User">
        <bind name="namePattern" value="'%' + name + '%'" />
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where>
            <if test="name != null">AND name LIKE #{namePattern}</if>
            <if test="status != null">AND status = #{status}</if>
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testTrimPrefixSuffix" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <trim prefix="WHERE " prefixOverrides="AND|OR" suffix=" LIMIT 100" suffixOverrides=",">
            <if test="name != null">AND name = #{name}</if>
            <if test="email != null">OR email = #{email}</if>
        </trim>
    </select>

<select id="testDynamicColumns" resultType="User">
        SELECT
        <if test="includeName">name,</if>
        <if test="includeEmail">email,</if>
        <if test="includeStatus">status,</if>
        <if test="includeType">type</if>
        id
        FROM users
        <where><if test="name != null">AND name = #{name}</if></where>
    </select>

<select id="testChooseTripleNested" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where>
            <choose>
                <when test="status != null">
                    <choose>
                        <when test="type != null">
                            <choose>
                                <when test="name != null">AND status = #{status} AND type = #{type} AND name = #{name}</when>
                                <otherwise>AND status = #{status} AND type = #{type}</otherwise>
                            </choose>
                        </when>
                        <otherwise>AND status = #{status}</otherwise>
                    </choose>
                </when>
                <when test="type != null">
                    <choose>
                        <when test="name != null">AND type = #{type} AND name = #{name}</when>
                        <otherwise>AND type = #{type}</otherwise>
                    </choose>
                </when>
                <otherwise>1=1</otherwise>
            </choose>
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testIfMultiCondition" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where>
            <if test="name != null and email != null and status != null">AND name = #{name} AND email = #{email} AND status = #{status}</if>
            <if test="name != null and email != null and status == null">AND name = #{name} AND email = #{email}</if>
            <if test="name != null and email == null">AND name = #{name}</if>
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testForeachChoose" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where>
            <choose>
                <when test="ids != null and ids.size() > 0">id IN <foreach collection="ids" item="id" open="(" separator="," close=")">#{id}</foreach></when>
                <when test="status != null">status = #{status}</when>
                <otherwise>1=1</otherwise>
            </choose>
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testIfForeachComplex" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where>
            <if test="status != null">
                AND status = #{status}
                <if test="types != null and types.size() > 0">AND type IN <foreach collection="types" item="t" open="(" separator="," close=")">#{t}</foreach></if>
            </if>
            <if test="name != null">
                AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
                <if test="ids != null and ids.size() > 0">AND id NOT IN <foreach collection="ids" item="id" open="(" separator="," close=")">#{id}</foreach></if>
            </if>
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testIncludeBaseColumns" resultType="User">
        SELECT <include refid="baseColumns" /> FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
    </select>

<select id="testIncludeCondition" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where>
            <include refid="statusCondition" />
            <include refid="typeCondition" />
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testMultipleInclude" resultType="User">
        SELECT <include refid="baseColumns" /> FROM users
        <where>
            <include refid="commonWhere" />
            <include refid="statusCondition" />
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testIncludeComplex" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where>
            <include refid="complexCondition" />
            <if test="name != null">AND name = #{name}</if>
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testIncludeInIf" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where>
            <if test="useStatusFilter"><include refid="statusCondition" /></if>
            <if test="useTypeFilter"><include refid="typeCondition" /></if>
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testIncludeInChoose" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where>
            <choose>
                <when test="filterMode == 'status'"><include refid="statusCondition" /></when>
                <when test="filterMode == 'type'"><include refid="typeCondition" /></when>
                <otherwise><include refid="commonWhere" /></otherwise>
            </choose>
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testMultipleBind" resultType="User">
        <bind name="namePattern" value="'%' + name + '%'" />
        <bind name="emailPattern" value="'%' + email + '%'" />
        <bind name="effectiveStatus" value="status != null ? status : '1'" />
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where>
            <if test="name != null">AND name LIKE #{namePattern}</if>
            <if test="email != null">AND email LIKE #{emailPattern}</if>
            AND status = #{effectiveStatus}
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testBindWithInclude" resultType="User">
        <bind name="defaultStatus" value="'1'" />
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where>
            <include refid="statusCondition" />
            AND status = #{defaultStatus}
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testEmptyIf" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where><if test="false">AND 1=0</if></where>
    </select>

<select id="testOnlyOtherwise" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where>
            <choose><otherwise>AND status = '1'</otherwise></choose>
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testNestedTrim" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <trim prefix="WHERE " prefixOverrides="AND|OR">
            <trim prefix="(" suffix=") " suffixOverrides="AND">
                <if test="name != null">name = #{name} AND</if>
                <if test="email != null">email = #{email} AND</if>
            </trim>
        </trim>
    </select>

<select id="testNestedForeach" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where>
            <if test="statusList != null and statusList.size() > 0">
                status IN
                <foreach collection="statusList" item="s" open="(" separator="," close=")">
                    <choose>
                        <when test="s == 'active'">'1'</when>
                        <when test="s == 'inactive'">'0'</when>
                        <otherwise>#{s}</otherwise>
                    </choose>
                </foreach>
            </if>
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testIncludeWithProperty" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where><include refid="statusCondition" /></where>
    </select>

<select id="testLongConditions" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where>
            <if test="name != null">AND name = #{name}</if>
            <if test="email != null">AND email = #{email}</if>
            <if test="c3 != null">AND 1=0</if>
            <if test="status != null">AND status = #{status}</if>
            <if test="c5 != null">AND 1=0</if>
            <if test="c6 != null">AND 1=0</if>
            <if test="type != null">AND type = #{type}</if>
            <if test="c8 != null">AND 1=0</if>
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testInnerJoin" resultType="com.test.dto.UserOrderDTO">
        SELECT u.id as userId, u.name as userName, u.email as userEmail,
               o.id as orderId, o.order_no as orderNo, o.status as orderStatus,
               o.amount, o.created_at as createdAt
        FROM users u
        INNER JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
        LIMIT 10
    </select>

<select id="testLeftJoin" resultType="com.test.dto.UserOrderDTO">
        SELECT u.id as userId, u.name as userName, u.email as userEmail,
               o.id as orderId, o.order_no as orderNo, o.status as orderStatus,
               o.amount, o.created_at as createdAt
        FROM users u
        LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
        LIMIT 10
    </select>

<select id="testMultiTableJoin" resultType="com.test.dto.UserOrderItemDTO">
        SELECT u.id as userId, u.name as userName,
               o.id as orderId, o.order_no as orderNo,
               oi.id as itemId, oi.product_id as productId,
               p.name as productName, oi.quantity, oi.price
        FROM users u
        INNER JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
        INNER JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id
        INNER JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
        WHERE u.id = #{userId}
    </select>

<select id="testDynamicJoin" resultType="com.test.dto.UserOrderDTO">
        SELECT u.id as userId, u.name as userName, u.email as userEmail,
               o.id as orderId, o.order_no as orderNo, o.status as orderStatus,
               o.amount, o.created_at as createdAt
        FROM users u
        INNER JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
        <where>
            <if test="userId != null">AND u.id = #{userId}</if>
            <if test="status != null">AND o.status = #{status}</if>
        </where>
        LIMIT 10
    </select>

<select id="testSubqueryIn" resultType="com.test.entity.User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        WHERE id IN
        <foreach collection="userIds" item="id" open="(" separator="," close=")">
            #{id}
        </foreach>
    </select>

<select id="testSubqueryExists" resultType="com.test.entity.User">
        SELECT * FROM users u
        WHERE EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM orders o WHERE o.user_id = u.id AND o.status = #{status}
        )
        LIMIT 10
    </select>

<select id="testScalarSubquery" resultType="com.test.dto.UserOrderCountDTO">
        SELECT u.id as userId, u.name as userName,
               (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o WHERE o.user_id = u.id) as orderCount
        FROM users u
        WHERE u.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM orders)
        LIMIT 10
    </select>

<select id="testDynamicMultiTableJoin" resultType="com.test.dto.UserOrderDTO">
        SELECT u.id as userId, u.name as userName, u.email as userEmail,
               o.id as orderId, o.order_no as orderNo, o.status as orderStatus,
               o.amount, o.created_at as createdAt
        FROM users u
        <if test="userId != null">
        INNER JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
        </if>
        <if test="userId == null">
        LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
        </if>
        <where>
            <if test="userId != null">AND u.id = #{userId}</if>
            <if test="orderStatus != null">AND o.status = #{orderStatus}</if>
        </where>
        LIMIT 10
    </select>

<select id="testUnion" resultType="com.test.entity.User">
        SELECT * FROM users WHERE type = #{type}
        UNION
        SELECT * FROM users WHERE status = '1'
    </select>

<select id="testNestedSubquery" resultType="com.test.dto.UserOrderDTO">
        SELECT u.id as userId, u.name as userName, u.email as userEmail,
               o.id as orderId, o.order_no as orderNo, o.status as orderStatus,
               o.amount, o.created_at as createdAt
        FROM users u
        INNER JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
        WHERE o.amount >= #{minAmount}
        AND o.user_id IN (
            SELECT user_id FROM orders 
            WHERE amount > (SELECT AVG(amount) FROM orders)
        )
        LIMIT 10
    </select>

<select id="testCountAll" resultType="java.lang.Integer">
        SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users
    </select>

<select id="testCountByStatus" resultType="java.lang.Integer">
        SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE status = #{status}
    </select>

<select id="testSumAmount" resultType="java.lang.Double">
        SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM orders
    </select>

<select id="testAvgAmount" resultType="java.lang.Double">
        SELECT COALESCE(AVG(amount), 0) FROM orders
    </select>

<select id="testMaxMinAmount" resultType="com.test.dto.OrderAmountDTO">
        SELECT MAX(amount) as maxAmount, MIN(amount) as minAmount FROM orders
    </select>

<select id="testGroupBy" resultType="com.test.dto.OrderStatusCountDTO">
        SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count FROM orders GROUP BY status
    </select>

<select id="testMultiGroupBy" resultType="com.test.dto.OrderUserStatusDTO">
        SELECT user_id as userId, status, COUNT(*) as count 
        FROM orders 
        WHERE user_id = #{userId}
        GROUP BY user_id, status
    </select>

<select id="testGroupByHaving" resultType="com.test.dto.OrderStatusCountDTO">
        SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count 
        FROM orders 
        GROUP BY status
        HAVING COUNT(*) >= #{minCount}
    </select>

<select id="testCaseWhen" resultType="com.test.dto.OrderCaseDTO">
        SELECT id as orderId, order_no as orderNo, status, amount,
               CASE status
                   WHEN 'completed' THEN '已完成'
                   WHEN 'pending' THEN '待处理'
                   WHEN 'processing' THEN '处理中'
                   WHEN 'cancelled' THEN '已取消'
                   ELSE '未知'
               END as statusLabel
        FROM orders
        LIMIT 10
    </select>

<select id="testDateFunction" resultType="com.test.dto.OrderDateDTO">
        SELECT id as orderId, order_no as orderNo, created_at as createdAt,
               YEAR(created_at) as year,
               MONTH(created_at) as month,
               DAY(created_at) as day
        FROM orders
        WHERE YEAR(created_at) = #{year}
        LIMIT 10
    </select>

<select id="testStringConcat" resultType="com.test.entity.User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        WHERE CONCAT(name, '-', email) LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%')
    </select>

<select id="testStringSubstring" resultType="com.test.entity.User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        WHERE SUBSTRING(email, 1, 3) = #{pattern}
    </select>

<select id="testConditionalSum" resultType="java.lang.Double">
        SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = #{status} THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) 
        FROM orders
    </select>

<select id="testMultiAggFunction" resultType="com.test.dto.OrderAggDTO">
        SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count,
               SUM(amount) as sum,
               AVG(amount) as avg,
               MAX(amount) as max,
               MIN(amount) as min
        FROM orders
        GROUP BY status
    </select>

<select id="testOrderRank" resultType="com.test.dto.OrderRankDTO">
        SELECT id as orderId, order_no as orderNo, amount,
               (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o2 WHERE o2.amount > orders.amount) + 1 as `rank`
        FROM orders
        ORDER BY `rank`
        LIMIT 10
    </select>

<select id="testLimit" resultType="com.test.entity.Order">
        SELECT * FROM orders ORDER BY id LIMIT #{limit}
    </select>

<select id="testLimitOffset" resultType="com.test.entity.Order">
        SELECT * FROM orders ORDER BY id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
    </select>

<select id="testDynamicPagination" resultType="com.test.entity.Order">
        SELECT * FROM orders ORDER BY id
        <if test="offset != null and pageSize != null">
            LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
        </if>
    </select>

<select id="testDistinctStatus" resultType="java.lang.String">
        SELECT DISTINCT status FROM orders
    </select>

<select id="testDistinctMultipleFields" resultType="com.test.entity.User">
        SELECT DISTINCT name, email FROM users WHERE status IS NOT NULL
    </select>

<select id="testReturningSyntax" resultType="com.test.entity.Order">
        SELECT * FROM orders WHERE id = 1
    </select>

<select id="testDistinctWithCondition" resultType="java.lang.String">
        SELECT DISTINCT status FROM orders
        <where>
            <if test="status != null">AND status = #{status}</if>
        </where>
        LIMIT 10
    </select>

<select id="testCountDistinct" resultType="java.lang.Integer">
        SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM orders
        <where>
            <if test="status != null">AND status = #{status}</if>
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testOrderByMultipleWithPagination" resultType="com.test.entity.Order">
        SELECT * FROM orders ORDER BY status, amount DESC
        <if test="offset != null and pageSize != null">
            LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
        </if>
    </select>

<select id="testComplexAggregation" resultType="com.test.dto.OrderStatusCountDTO">
        SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count FROM orders
        WHERE amount > #{minAmount}
        GROUP BY status
        HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
        ORDER BY count DESC
        LIMIT 10
    </select>

<select id="testUnionWithLimit" resultType="com.test.entity.User">
        SELECT * FROM users WHERE type = #{type}
        UNION
        SELECT * FROM users WHERE status = '1'
        LIMIT #{limit}
    </select>

<select id="testCrossFileInclude" resultType="User">
        SELECT <include refid="com.test.mapper.CommonMapper.userBaseColumns" />
        FROM users
        <where>
            <include refid="com.test.mapper.CommonMapper.activeStatusCondition" />
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testCrossFileIncludeWithIf" resultType="User">
        SELECT <include refid="com.test.mapper.CommonMapper.userBaseColumns" />,
               <include refid="com.test.mapper.CommonMapper.auditColumns" />
        FROM users
        <where>
            <if test="name != null">AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')</if>
            <include refid="com.test.mapper.CommonMapper.activeStatusCondition" />
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testLocalFragmentWithCrossFile" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where>
            <include refid="userSearchWithCommon" />
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testCrossFileInChoose" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where>
            <choose>
                <when test="filterMode == 'active'">
                    <include refid="com.test.mapper.CommonMapper.activeStatusCondition" />
                </when>
                <when test="filterMode == 'complex'">
                    <include refid="com.test.mapper.CommonMapper.complexCommonCondition" />
                </when>
                <otherwise>
                    <include refid="com.test.mapper.CommonMapper.dateRangeCondition" />
                </otherwise>
            </choose>
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testCrossFileWithForeach" resultType="User">
        SELECT <include refid="com.test.mapper.CommonMapper.userBaseColumns" />
        FROM users
        <where>
            <if test="ids != null and ids.size() > 0">
                AND id IN
                <foreach collection="ids" item="id" open="(" separator="," close=")">#{id}</foreach>
            </if>
            <include refid="com.test.mapper.CommonMapper.activeStatusCondition" />
        </where>
        <include refid="com.test.mapper.CommonMapper.paginationCondition" />
    </select>

<select id="testMultipleCrossFileInclude" resultType="User">
        SELECT u1.id, u1.name, u1.email, u1.status, u1.type
        FROM users u1
        INNER JOIN users u2 ON u1.type = u2.type
        <where>
            u1.status = #{status}
            AND u2.status = u1.status
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testCrossFileNestedChoose" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where>
            <if test="useComplex">
                <include refid="com.test.mapper.CommonMapper.complexCommonCondition" />
            </if>
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testCrossFileInTrim" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <trim prefix="WHERE " prefixOverrides="AND|OR">
            <include refid="com.test.mapper.CommonMapper.activeStatusCondition" />
            <if test="type != null">AND type = #{type}</if>
        </trim>
    </select>

<select id="testChainedCrossFileInclude" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users
        <where>
            <include refid="chainedCondition" />
        </where>
    </select>

<select id="testResultMapAssociation" resultMap="userOrderNestedMap">
        SELECT u.id as u_id, u.name as u_name, u.email as u_email,
               o.id as o_id, o.order_no as o_no, o.amount as o_amount
        FROM users u
        LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
        LIMIT 10
    </select>

<select id="testResultMapCollection" resultMap="userWithOrdersMap">
        SELECT u.id as u_id, u.name as u_name,
               o.id as o_id, o.order_no as o_no, o.amount as o_amount
        FROM users u
        LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
        WHERE u.id = 1
    </select>

<select id="testResultMapNoId" resultMap="badResultMapNoId">
        SELECT name, email FROM users LIMIT 5
    </select>

<select id="getOrdersByUserId" resultType="com.test.entity.Order">
        SELECT id, order_no as orderNo, amount, user_id as userId
        FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId}
    </select>

<select id="testNestedSelectN1" resultMap="nestedSelectMap">
        SELECT id, name FROM users LIMIT 5
    </select>

<select id="testNestedResult" resultMap="nestedResultMap">
        SELECT u.id as u_id, u.name as u_name,
               o.id as o_id, o.order_no as o_no, o.amount as o_amount
        FROM users u
        LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
        WHERE u.id = 1
    </select>

<select id="testDiscriminator" resultMap="userTypeMap">
        SELECT * FROM users
    </select>

<select id="testCorrelatedSubquery" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users u
        WHERE u.id IN (
            SELECT o.user_id FROM orders o 
            WHERE o.amount > 1000
        )
        LIMIT 10
    </select>

<select id="testScalarSubqueryNew" resultType="com.test.dto.UserOrderCountDTO">
        SELECT u.id as userId, u.name as userName,
               (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o WHERE o.user_id = u.id) as orderCount
        FROM users u
        LIMIT 10
    </select>

<select id="testNestedSubqueryComplex" resultType="User">
        SELECT * FROM users WHERE id IN (
            SELECT user_id FROM orders WHERE amount > (
                SELECT AVG(amount) FROM orders
            )
        )
        LIMIT 10
    </select>

<insert id="testForeachInsert">
        INSERT INTO users (name, email, status, type) VALUES
        <foreach collection="users" item="user" separator=",">
            (#{user.name}, #{user.email}, #{user.status}, #{user.type})
        </foreach>
    </insert>

<insert id="testInsertWithSelectKey">
        INSERT INTO users (name, email, status, type) VALUES
        <foreach collection="users" item="u" separator=",">
            (#{u.name}, #{u.email}, 
            <choose><when test="u.status != null">#{u.status}</when><otherwise>'1'</otherwise></choose>,
            <choose><when test="u.type != null">#{u.type}</when><otherwise>'NORMAL'</otherwise></choose>)
        </foreach>
    </insert>

<insert id="testInsertOnDuplicateKeyUpdate" parameterType="com.test.entity.User">
        INSERT INTO users (id, name, email, status, type)
        VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{email}, #{status}, #{type})
        ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
        name = VALUES(name), email = VALUES(email), status = VALUES(status), type = VALUES(type)
    </insert>

<insert id="testSelectKeyOracle" parameterType="User">
        <selectKey keyProperty="id" resultType="integer" order="BEFORE">
            SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM users
        </selectKey>
        INSERT INTO users (id, name, email, status) 
        VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{email}, '1')
    </insert>

<insert id="testSelectKeyPostgres" parameterType="User">
        <selectKey keyProperty="id" resultType="integer" order="BEFORE">
            SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM users
        </selectKey>
        INSERT INTO users (id, name, email, status) 
        VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{email}, '1')
    </insert>

<insert id="testSelectKeyMysql" parameterType="User">
        <selectKey keyProperty="id" resultType="integer" order="AFTER">
            SELECT MAX(id) FROM users
        </selectKey>
        INSERT INTO users (name, email, status) 
        VALUES (#{name}, #{email}, '1')
    </insert>

<insert id="testSelectKeyUuid" parameterType="User">
        <selectKey keyProperty="id" resultType="integer" order="BEFORE">
            SELECT FLOOR(RAND() * 1000000)
        </selectKey>
        INSERT INTO users (id, name, email, status) 
        VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{email}, '1')
    </insert>

<update id="testSetIf">
        UPDATE users
        <set>
            <if test="name != null">name = #{name},</if>
            <if test="email != null">email = #{email},</if>
        </set>
        <where>
            <if test="id != null">AND id = #{id}</if>
        </where>
    </update>

<update id="testSetMultipleIf">
        UPDATE users
        <set>
            <if test="name != null">name = #{name},</if>
            <if test="email != null">email = #{email},</if>
            <if test="status != null">status = #{status},</if>
            <if test="type != null">type = #{type},</if>
        </set>
        <where>
            <if test="id != null">AND id = #{id}</if>
        </where>
    </update>

<update id="testTrimUpdate">
        UPDATE users
        <trim prefix="SET " suffixOverrides=",">
            <if test="name != null">name = #{name},</if>
            <if test="email != null">email = #{email},</if>
            <if test="status != null">status = #{status},</if>
        </trim>
        <where>
            <if test="id != null">AND id = #{id}</if>
        </where>
    </update>

<update id="testCrossFileInSet">
        UPDATE users
        <set>
            <if test="status != null">status = #{status},</if>
            updated_at = NOW()
        </set>
        <where>
            <include refid="com.test.mapper.CommonMapper.activeStatusCondition" />
        </where>
    </update>
